creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tcberner
Date: Sat Nov  9 08:11:10 UTC 2019
New revision: 517111
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/517111

Log:
  New Port -- devel/git-delta, A syntax-highlighting pager for git

  Delta brings language syntax highlighting, within-line insertion/deletion
  detection, and restructured diff output to git on the command line.

  https://github.com/dandavison/delta

  PR:		241794
  Submitted by:	Greg V <greg@unrelenting.technology>

Changes:
  head/devel/Makefile
  head/devel/git-delta/
  head/devel/git-delta/Makefile
  head/devel/git-delta/distinfo
  head/devel/git-delta/pkg-descr
